commits: c1038f97 fix(audiobook-player): prevent cover letterbox via shrink-0 + safelist + regression test
f7a9124d refactor(cover-fix): remove redundant @source inline() safelist

intent: Round 2 — verify R1 MEDIUM finding F1 (redundant @source inline safelist) is fully resolved by commit f7a9124d, and check that no new issues were introduced by removing the safelist block.

F1_redundant_safelist_MEDIUM.evidence: Commit f7a9124d deletes the entire `@source inline("aspect-square shrink-0 ...")` line and its 8-line explanatory comment. tailwind.css now contains only `@import 'tailwindcss' source(none);` and `@source '../**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}';` — no inline safelist remains. The literal class strings on AudiobookRenderer.tsx:470,477 are statically discoverable by the source scan, so removal does not regress styling.
F1_redundant_safelist_MEDIUM.verification: npm run build completed in 68s with no Tailwind warnings; CSS bundle still emits the required utilities since they appear as literal strings in JSX.

F6_safelist_no_op_NIT.evidence: Same commit — F6 was the same root cause as F1, both flagged the safelist as redundant.

F2_F3_F4_F5_LOW_advisory.note: Per user request, only the MEDIUM finding was the focus of R2. F2 (shrink-0 not called out in comment), F3 (mockAudioElement duplication), F4 (aspectRatio computed-style assertion), F5 (mini-player + backdrop verification note) remain unresolved as LOW/advisory residuals. None block merge.

findings.title: Stray double blank line left after safelist removal
findings.summary: Commit f7a9124d removed lines 3-13 of tailwind.css but left two consecutive blank lines (lines 3-4 are both empty). Cosmetic only — does not affect build, CSS output, or behavior. A trailing single blank line is the conventional separator between top-level @import groups.
findings.suggestedFix: Collapse the double blank line into a single blank line at src/styles/tailwind.css:3-4. One-line edit, no behavioral risk.

residual_risks: F2-F5 from R1 remain unresolved (LOW/advisory). User acknowledged these as residuals.

Removing the safelist means the regression test is now the sole guardrail against Tailwind v4 source-scan regressions. The test is solid (asserts actual geometry on a real non-square fixture), but it only covers AudiobookRenderer — not AudioMiniPlayer or other cover-rendering paths. This was already noted in R1 F5.
verdict: Ready to merge — R1 MEDIUM finding fully resolved, no new issues introduced beyond a cosmetic double-blank-line nit.
